name: Piranha Feeding
short_description: Piranha Feeding is a thrilling action game with rogue-lite elements, where you control a voracious school of piranhas on a quest for the ultimate feeding frenzy. Conquer a succession of prey, ranging from smaller aquatic creatures to formidable adversaries, unlocking new abilities along the way.
detailed_description:
Piranha Feeding is a thrilling action "survivor" game with rogue-lite elements that puts you in control of a voracious school of piranhas on a quest for the ultimate feeding frenzy.

You control the Piranha Leader and lead your group of piranhas using straightforward 4-button controls, enabling you to attack, defend, turn left, and turn right. In each feeding round, your goal is to conquer the prey, devour its leftovers, and enhance both your abilities and the overall prowess of your school.

Features

  • Realistic prey, ranging from smaller aquatic creatures to formidable adversaries that meet a gruesome demise
  • Addictive easy-to-learn difficult-to-master gameplay
  • Simple 4-button control scheme

WARNING: contains live feedings. Not for the faint of heart!
